series_metadata.series_title: Requests to Take MH Licensing Exam
series_metadata.series_description: Records relating to the request to take licensing exam for prospective manufactured home installers or inspectors, grant or denial of, and any accompanying paperwork.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: The record shall be destroyed three years after the request was submitted. ; Paper: If an electronic version of the record exists, the paper copy shall be destroyed. If an electronic version of the record does not exist, then the paper record shall be destroyed three years after the request was submitted., Electronic: Erase ; Paper: Shred
